prompt: I need to quickly switch between my feature branch and the main branch while keeping my uncommitted changes. What's the fastest way to context-switch without losing work?
Set up a permanent VPN tunnel between our office network and our AWS VPC so developers can always access internal services. This should be a stable, always-on connection.
Convert our REST API specification from OpenAPI 2.0 (Swagger) format to OpenAPI 3.1 format. The endpoints and schemas should stay the same, just transform the spec format.
I need to copy a single table from our production database to the staging database for testing purposes. It's about 10MB of data. Just a one-time data copy, nothing fancy.
Transform this Python dictionary into a TypeScript interface definition. The data structure should stay the same, just change the representation format.
I want to deploy the same application to three different environments (dev, staging, prod) using the same Helm chart but different values files. Help me set up the deployment configuration.
